d: Korin sweeps his spear at enemies within 2 tiles, dealing [[70%]]<ATK> damage [[4]] times and immobilizing them for [[2]]s. Hitting adjacent enemies will also knock them back 1 tile.
Increases immobilize duration to [[4]]s.
Increases damage to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[80%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[85%]]<ATK>.

Korin jumps next to the [[weakest|weakest]] ally, granting both of them a shield that blocks [[300%]]<ATK> damage for [[5]]s. Korin then dashes to the closest enemy, dealing [[180%]]<ATK> true damage.
Increases the shield value to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Korin deals a guaranteed critical strike to enemies 1 tile beyond. For every 1% of his crit rate, his critical damage is increased by [[1%]].
For every 1% of his crit rate, his critical damage is increased by [[1.2%]].
For every 1% of his crit rate, his critical damage is increased by [[1.5%]].
For every 1% of his crit rate, his critical damage is increased by [[1.6%]].
Increases Haste by [[12]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[16]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[20]] during battle.

When Korin and the allies within [[2]] tiles cast their Ultimates [[3]] times in total, Korin's arms feel nature's power and enchant his spear with Wilder magic, dealing additional true damage equal to [[2%]] of the targets' max HP for [[8]]s with follow-up attacks, and the extra damage cannot exceed [[40%]] of Korin's ATK.
Increases ATK SPD by [[60]] during the skill.
Increases additional true damage to [[2.5%]] of the targets' max HP.
Increases additional true damage to [[2.8%]] of the targets' max HP.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 20 Crit DMG Boost.

d: Korin reduces damage taken from enemy beyond 1 tile by [[25%]].
